title: Black Clover Custom GUI Pack
body:
**![Preview Image](https://i.imgur.com/GRaLDkC.jpg)**

**Introduction:**
It's GUI ONLY Resource pack so you can freely use it with other resource packs. Just place it on top of resource pack you use.

This is a GUI packed themed towards the show  "Black Clover Custom GUI Pack". Don't hesitate to comment down below, I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy. I have taken the opportunity to experiment with adding different pictures to each container. The palette that I choose is Orange & Blue & Black but maybe in the future, If you guys want other colors like Pink & Red or any colors else. please tell me I will think about it!
If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.

Check out the Discord server. where you can suggest and vote for the next pack , as well as participate in anime discussion. I will also being doing Discord nitro giveaways every month, You can find a link down below

**Feature Highlights:**
- **Hud:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/hhorjAp.png)
- **Creative Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/pbzSeuj.png)
- **Settings:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/zJA2Jop.png)
- **Blast Furnace:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/2xluHro.png)
- **Brewing Stand:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/gqvkgT5.png)
- **Chest:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/tgG5TMa.png)
- **Stonecutter:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/Dr22Oco.png)
- **Beacon Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/4GLih1j.png)
- **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/N6l70x8.png)

**Community Engagement:**
Join our Discord server to suggest and vote for the next pack, participate in discussions, and have a chance to win Discord Nitro giveaways every month. [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph)

**Additional Resources:**
- [ListarMC Website](https://listarmc.com/)
- [Support via Ko-fi](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/listarMc)

**Thank you for your support! ❤️**
